name: @leanish/ship-it-normalizer
description: Webhook normalizer for ship-it — a single Lambda (Function URL) that gates, filters, and normalizes Jira/GitHub webhook events into signed `ship-it-event` envelopes on ship-it's SQS queue. Registered as just another consumer (`webhook-normalizer`).

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm test
scripts.check:full: npm run check && npm run test:integration

dependencies-comment: AWS SDK clients are constructed directly only in src/lambda.ts (cold-start wiring) and src/sender.ts (SQS SendMessage); everything else is injectable.
